title: Opening for Store Manager at Dulux Decorator Centre Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at Dulux Decorator Centre Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Dulux Decorator Centre Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Dulux Decorator Centre Ventures Solutions:
Dulux Decorator Centre Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dulux Decorator Centre Ventures Solutions!
